name: Nesselrode Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Coarsely chopped blanched almonds, toasted
1/3 cup Maraschino cherries, cut into fourths
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the frozen confection filling with a Christmas garden of cherry poinsettias and gumdrop holly atop.
2. Beat the egg whites until foamy, then gradually add granulated sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
3. Gently fold in the toasted almonds, cut maraschino cherries, cherry syrup, and vanilla extract into the egg white mixture.
4. Fold in sifted confectioners' sugar into the whipped cream; gently incorporate into the first mixture.
5. Pour the filling into a prepared Vanilla-wafer crust and freeze until firm.
6. Garnish the top with maraschino cherry poinsettias and gumdrop holly leaves.
Vanilla-wafer Crust:
1. Combine 1 1/4 cups fine vanilla wafer crumbs with 1/3 cup melted butter or margarine.
2. Press the mixture into a buttered 9-inch pie plate, chilling until firm (about 45 minutes).
